meaning: adj.象小束状的,纤细的,脆弱的
examples: So The White Moustache remains just a wispy little thing.
On Earth, NASA says, white wispy cirrus clouds are made of ice crystals.
The white floodlight shines through the wispy tule and makes thin shadows.
It's a smart performance that doesn't overemphasize the wispy, ethereal nature of the music.
Boss could be travelling to Ireland missus his Hamish-style wispy beard that first appeared last year.
